summary: Comprehensive dashboard audit completed. 17/17 backend tests passed. Fixed VoiceQuickActions.jsx syntax error. All dashboard tabs verified working on desktop. Mobile dashboard has bottom tab bar with HOME, SERVICES, ORDERS, MY PET. Back to Home + X close button implemented in code. Service Desk merge API working.
critical_code_review_comments: VoiceQuickActions.jsx had syntax error - extra closing brace causing 'return outside of function' - FIXED
context_for_next_testing_agent: All dashboard features verified working. VoiceQuickActions.jsx syntax error fixed. Backend APIs all passing. Desktop shows all 14 tabs. Mobile has bottom tab bar with 4 main tabs. Back to Home + X close button implemented for non-overview tabs on mobile.

HOME_Overview_tab.details: Pet cards display, Mira welcome message, navigation all working

SERVICES_tab.details: Services list shows all 14 pillars with booking actions

PAW_POINTS_tab.details: Balance display (0 points), View History button, Redeem button present

MIRA_AI_tab.details: Memory section and chat capabilities available

BOOKINGS_Requests_tab.details: Booking list with status display working

PETS_tab.details: Pet list and add pet functionality working

ADDRESSES_tab.details: Add Address button present, Edit/Delete buttons in code

SETTINGS_tab.details: Push notification toggle present, Voice Quick Actions on mobile

PLAN_Membership_tab.details: Shows Free Tier, VALID FROM/UNTIL dates, Upgrade buttons

Mobile_Back_to_Home_X_close.details: Implemented in MemberDashboard.jsx lines 1250-1268, shows on non-overview tabs

Mobile_Tab_bar_scroll.details: Bottom tab bar with HOME, SERVICES, ORDERS, MY PET visible

Desktop_all_tabs_visible.details: All 14 tabs visible in tab bar: Home, Services, Paw Points, Mira AI, Bookings, Orders, Quotes, Documents, Autoship, Reviews, Pets, Addresses, Settings, Plan

Service_Desk_Merge.details: API endpoint /api/concierge/tickets/merge exists and works. Requires primary_ticket_id, secondary_ticket_ids, agent_name

VoiceQuickActions_syntax_error.issue: Extra closing brace at line 134-135 causing 'return outside of function' error
